## KPI Targets (overrides global defaults)

| Metric | Target | Pause threshold | Scale threshold |
|---|---|---|---|
| CPA | {{TARGET_CPA}} | > {{PAUSE_CPA}} after {{MIN_SPEND_CPA}} | N/A |
| ROAS | {{TARGET_ROAS}} | < {{PAUSE_ROAS}} after {{MIN_SPEND_ROAS}} | > {{SCALE_ROAS}} for 3 consecutive days |
| CTR | — | < {{PAUSE_CTR}} after {{MIN_SPEND_CTR}} | N/A |
| Frequency | — | > {{FREQ_CAP}} in 7-day window | N/A |

## Tracking & UTM

All destination URLs MUST include:
```
?utm_source=meta&utm_medium=paid_social&utm_campaign={campaign_name}&utm_content={ad_name}
```
The `utm-enforcer` hook injects this template if missing.
